3302540.name: Veil : Black Blood
3302540.description:
Veil is built around a deep, dynamic magic system—one that abandons traditional attribute and skill points in favor of true discovery. The world is yours to explore, its mystical symbols waiting to be uncovered. Through these ancient shapes, you will weave spells in the midst of battle or enact powerful rituals that alter the very fabric of reality—shifting the weather, influencing fate, and reshaping the world.

Each symbol embodies a fundamental principle of magic, governing forces like projectiles, summoning, movement, and transformation. The magic system is loosely inspired by classical alchemical texts and esoteric traditions, weaving historical mysticism into its core mechanics. Mastery is not granted through character levels but through player knowledge and experimentation. The more you learn, the more powerful your spells become, as hidden meanings and unexpected interactions emerge.

In Veil, magic is not just a tool—it is a language, waiting to be understood. Will you uncover its secrets?
